title: MapMyCells Pipeline Parameters
description: Pipeline for cell type classification using MapMyCells with support for multiple input formats

query_markers_json.description: Path to the classification model JSON file containing query markers

precomputed_stats_h5ad.description: Path to the classification model H5AD file with precomputed statistics

dge_h5ad.description: Path to input DGE file in H5AD format (Option 1 - preferred)

dge_matrix.description: Path to input DGE in dense tabular format (Option 2 - requires reduced_gtf)

reduced_gtf.description: Path to Drop-seq-style reduced GTF file. Required when using dge_matrix

matrix_mtx.description: Path to 10X-style MatrixMarket DGE file (Option 3 - requires features_tsv and barcodes_tsv)

features_tsv.description: Path to 10X-style gene names TSV file. Required when using matrix_mtx

barcodes_tsv.description: Path to 10X-style cell barcode names TSV file. Required when using matrix_mtx

mmc_args.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to MapMyCells_fromSpecifiedMarkers

gene_mapping.description: Path to SQLite database file used by MapMyCells for gene mapping

analysis_identifier.description: Identifier used to name output files (default: mapmycells_analysis)

outdir.description: Output directory where analysis results will be published (default: results)
